\begin{tikzpicture}[scale=0.9]
\def\gridline#1{\begin{scope}[on background layer]\draw[thin,gray] #1 -- +(5*2.4142135623730954,5*1);
\draw[thin,gray] #1 -- +(-5*2.4142135623730954,-5*1);
\end{scope}
}
\def\blackgridline#1{\begin{scope}[on background layer]\draw[thin] #1 -- +(5*2.4142135623730954,5*1);%
\draw[thin] #1 -- +(-5*2.4142135623730954,-5*1);
\end{scope}
}
\begin{scope}[on background layer]
\path[clip] (-2.0,-2.1) -- (-2.0,4.4) -- (4.5,4.4) -- (4.5,-2.1) -- cycle;
\end{scope}
\path[clip] (-2.0,-2.1) -- (-2.0,4.4) -- (4.5,4.4) -- (4.5,-2.1) -- cycle;
\draw[->] (-2.0,1.25) -- (4.5, 1.25);
\draw[->] (1.25,-2.1) -- (1.25,4.4);
% epsilon-region
\draw[fill=blue!10] (1.25,1.25)+(-67.5-40:2.4) arc (-67.5-40:-67.5+40:2.4) -- cycle;
\path (1.25,1.25)+(-67.5:2.1) node {$\Repsilon$};
\begin{scope}[scale=1.5,shift={(0,-0.3)}]
% blue lines for alpha, beta, b
\begin{scope}[on background layer]
\fill[blue!50!black,thick,fill=blue!10] (2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954) 
                  -- (2.4142135623730954,1.1333333333)
                  -- (0.833333333,1.1333333333)
                  -- +(0,0.6260581975792701);
\end{scope}
\draw[blue!50!black,thick] (2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954) 
                  -- (2.4142135623730954,1.1333333333)
                  -- (0.833333333,1.1333333333);
\path[blue!50!black] (2.414213562373095,1.7737734478365477) node[right] {$\beta$};
\path[blue!50!black] (1.6237734476865477,1.1333333333) node[above] {$\alpha$};
                  
\draw (0.833333333,1.1333333333+0.6260581975792701) -- +(-0.4,0) node [left] {$b$};
\begin{scope}[on background layer]
\draw[red,fill=pink] (2.414213562373095-0.2*2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954-0.2*1) --
            (2.414213562373095-0.2*2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954-0.5*1) --
            (2.414213562373095-0.5*2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954-0.5*1);
\end{scope}
\path[black] (2.414213562373095-0.3*2.414213562373095,2.4142135623730954-0.4*1) node {$r$};
% nodes and lines
